title: T-060 — Consolidate GS1/barcode parser to one shared package (packages/gs1)
prompt:
# T-060 — Consolidate GS1/barcode parser to packages/gs1

## Goal
Designate the existing `packages/gs1/` (parse.ts + check-digit.ts) as the single shared GS1-128/GTIN/AI parser consumed by both 05-warehouse (T-023 GRN auto-fill) and 06-scanner (T-003). Extend it to the full PRD AI set and retarget both task references. Closes the cross-module triple-conflict (packages/barcode-parser, packages/scanner-utils/gs1-parser.ts, lib/utils/gs1-parser.ts all proposed but packages/gs1 already exists).

## Implementation contract
1. Audit `packages/gs1/parse.ts` + `check-digit.ts` against PRD 05 §7.4/§15.2 and 06 §10 AI list (01/10/17/11/21/37/310x/3103/3922; P2: 00/13/15, QR, DataMatrix).
2. Add missing AIs + `detectBarcodeType()` + `parseGS1()` returning the §10.3 `ParsedGS1` shape; ≥20 fixtures/AI incl. missing-GS, bad checksum, leading-zero weight, mixed-case batch, UTF-8.
3. Update WH T-023 + SCN T-003 scope_files + prompts to import from `packages/gs1/`; retire `packages/barcode-parser/` and `packages/scanner-utils/gs1-parser.ts` references.

## Acceptance criteria
- AC1 — WH GRN auto-fill and SCN scan parse the same GS1-128 string via the same parser → identical AI maps.
- AC2 — ≥20 fixtures per P1 AI pass incl. edge cases; GTIN-14 mod-10 validates.
- AC3 — T-023 and SCN T-003 reference `packages/gs1/`; no `packages/barcode-parser/` or `packages/scanner-utils/gs1-parser.ts` path remains.

pipeline_inputs.description: Designate packages/gs1/ as the single shared GS1/GTIN/AI parser for WH T-023 + SCN T-003; extend to full PRD AI set; retire packages/barcode-parser + packages/scanner-utils/gs1-parser.ts. Source: sidecar m05-T060 stub. Do this BEFORE T-023 and SCN T-003.
pipeline_inputs.details: Designate packages/gs1/ as the single shared GS1/GTIN/AI parser for WH T-023 + SCN T-003; extend to full PRD AI set; retire packages/barcode-parser + packages/scanner-utils/gs1-parser.ts. Source: sidecar m05-T060 stub. Do this BEFORE T-023 and SCN T-003.
out_of_scope: Do not change unrelated task scope.

cross_module_dependencies.reason: Scanner GS1 parse must import the same packages/gs1 parser; retarget its refs.

acceptance_criteria: WH GRN auto-fill and SCN scan return identical AI maps from the same packages/gs1 parser.
≥20 fixtures per P1 AI pass incl. edge cases; GTIN-14 mod-10 validates.
No packages/barcode-parser or packages/scanner-utils/gs1-parser.ts path remains in T-023 / SCN T-003.
test_strategy: RED-first per the implementation contract; capture actual test output.
risk_red_lines: Do not create a second parser package — one shared packages/gs1.
Do not hardcode the Y2K boundary differently between WH and SCN (YY<50→20YY).
